source_corpus: Law Firm OS UI/Amplitude web Feb 2025
extraction_note: Palette values are sampled from the Amplitude corpus and quantized to 8-point RGB buckets. The bottom Mobbin attribution band is excluded from sampling.

canvas.source: dominant app canvas and auth background samples

surface.source: panel, modal, table, and topbar samples

surface_subtle.source: table header, hover row, setup card samples

border.source: panel and table grid candidate samples

active_blue.source: primary CTA and selected navigation candidates

active_blue_soft.source: selected rows, cards, tabs, and blue notices
